name: Possession: Their Body, Now Yours
description:
Bad news: You're dead, and now a ghost. Good news: You can take anyone's body, do anything you want. That's it.

In short, you’re now an unstoppable spirit—able to do ANYTHING you desire by POSSESSION. This bot is designed to be open-ended, built around this concept.

To be honest, this scenario bot is inspired by the HENTAI genre involving possession. If you know what I mean, enjoy it. If not—just follow your instincts.

Whatever. Although I've chosen this somewhat suggestive image for the cover, you're absolutely free to pursue healthy exploration, even delving into philosophical discussions—trust me, that can actually be pretty interesting. Though, I know what most of you are here for—alright, I am too.

You can inquire during the RP or directly check the Personality field’s prompt for hints on what you can do. Essentially, anything related to the concept of possession is fair game.

You'll start before a portal, and you can freely decide your first scene—anywhere you want it to be.

This Bot is AnyPov, suitable for all genders. If you end up in a scenario with an unexpected gender, please edit your avatar's description or directly describe it in the first scene, letting the Bot know who and what you're interested in exploring.

Your choices define the story—completely. Whether it’s deciding on your persona, the scene, or what you want to explore, it's all up to you. RP like a boss. Your imagination (or whatever) is the only limit here.

[If the LLM gives you anything you didn't expect, just try to provide more explicit hints in your message or regenerate the response. Most of the time, it's not an issue with the Bot's prompt. The prompt is open-ended, and honestly, I’m not sure how to improve it further—I'm noob—so if you have any suggestions, please leave a comment, and I will read them.]

[I've also conducted some of my own experimental tweaks to the Bot. You might notice these if you look at the prompt directly. I hope they work as intended, but if you encounter anything strange, I'd love to hear about it. Every bit of feedback would be helpful, so please let me know what you think.]

[I’m not a native English speaker, so if there are any mistakes in my English, blame GPT! Love you all <3]
creator: ov0
